name: medi-cal-precert
description: Medi-Cal (California Medicaid) prior-authorization (Treatment Authorization Request) packet for a hospital-outpatient (POS 22) knee arthroscopy on an adult member. The 'Medi-Cal' letterhead routes the bundle to the 'medicaid-ca' payer bucket (spec-v52 §4.5.30); both the §4.5.4 state-agnostic Medicaid core (R-PA-MCD-NNN, which fires via isMedicaid) and the Medi-Cal state overlay (R-PA-MCAL-NNN) engage. The packet is a complete Medicaid request -- eligibility verified, state medical-necessity criteria cited, MCO/FFS indicated -- so the Medicaid core rules pass; it names the TAR channel (R-PA-MCAL-003 pass) and attaches a clinical note (R-PA-MCAL-001/002 pass). As an outpatient surgery requested in a hospital-outpatient setting it carries no site-of-care rationale (R-PA-MCAL-009 flag). The member is an adult, so the EPSDT core rule self-gates off. Every other Medi-Cal overlay rule self-gates off and vacuously passes.

documents.name: medi-cal-tar.txt
documents.text:
Medi-Cal Treatment Authorization Request (TAR)
Patient: Mary C Roe
DOB: 1968-11-22
Member ID: 90000000A
Date of service: 2026-06-25
Place of service: 22
Requested procedure: knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy CPT 29881
Dx: M23.205 derangement of medial meniscus, left knee
Quantity: 1
Ordering provider NPI: 1234567893
Servicing facility NPI: 1306849393
TIN: 123456789
Plan: Medi-Cal managed care plan.
Eligibility verified: active eligibility on file for the date of service.
Medical necessity: persistent mechanical symptoms; see the applicable Medi-Cal Medical Policy and the Medicaid medical necessity criteria.
Signature: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10

documents.name: medi-cal-note.txt
documents.text:
Clinical note
Chief complaint: left knee pain with locking and catching.
History of present illness: four months of mechanical symptoms despite activity modification.
Physical exam: positive McMurray on the left; joint-line tenderness medially.
Assessment and plan: left medial meniscus tear; recommend arthroscopic partial meniscectomy.
Medical necessity: imaging confirms a displaced medial meniscus tear.
Note date: 2026-06-10
Signed: Ortho Sports MD, 2026-06-10
